welcome_bio: I'm a software engineering graduate of the University of Mosul who couldn't wait for graduation to start shipping. Since 2025 I've been building production software — Vue frontends for enterprise surveillance systems, a bridge that lets browsers talk to document scanners, and the Astro and Laravel platforms that put Mosul's heritage online. One month it's WebSocket protocols in an R&D lab; the next, photogrammetry from a boat in the UNESCO-listed Iraqi Marshes.
welcome_mosul_caption: Home base: Mosul — with fieldwork in the UNESCO-listed Iraqi Marshes and a stop at the Ziggurat of Ur.
project_6_d: Frontend test suite wired into CI/CD
